steps.title: Apply the inequalities with y = 53
steps.content:
The point $(x, 53)$ has $y = 53$. The first inequality $y \gt 14$ is satisfied since $53 \gt 14$. Correct

For the second inequality $4x + y \lt 18$, substitute $y = 53$:
$$4x + 53 \lt 18$$
$$4x \lt -35$$
$$x \lt -8.75$$

steps.title: Determine which choice satisfies the constraint x < -8.75
steps.content:
Testing each choice:
  • $-9$: $-9 \lt -8.75$ Correct
  • $-5$: $-5 \lt -8.75$ Incorrect
  • $5$: $5 \lt -8.75$ Incorrect
  • $9$: $9 \lt -8.75$ Incorrect
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
